[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000000 a
1 0000000000 a
2 0010000100 2
3 0000000000 a
4 0000001010 2
5 1000001000 2
6 0011001100 4
7 0111100111 7

01 0111100111 7 match 7
12 0000000000 a match 0 1 3
23 0000000010 1
34 1000000000 1
45 0011000000 2
56 0100000110 3
67 0000010000 1
70 1000001000 2 match 5

02 0101100101 5
13 0000000000 a match 0 1 3
24 0000000010 1
35 1010000000 2
46 0111000100 4
57 0100010010 3
60 1000011000 3
71 1011001101 6

03 0101100011 5
14 0000000000 a match 0 1 3
25 0010000000 1
36 0010000100 2 match 2
47 0100000000 1
50 0000011000 2
61 1000011001 4
72 1001000101 4

04 0000100011 3
15 0000000000 a match 0 1 3
26 0010000010 2
37 0000000000 a match 0 1 3
40 0000001000 1
51 0100011111 6
62 1000010001 3
73 0001000001 2

05 0011100000 3
16 0000000000 a match 0 1 3
27 0000000010 1
30 1000001000 2 match 5

52 0100010101 4

17 0000000000 a match 0 1 3
20 0000001000 1
31 1010001100 4

53 0100010011 4
64 1000010001 3
75 1011000000 3

07 0100100010 3
10 0000000000 a match 0 1 3

32 1000000100 2

54 0000010011 3
